Variables.Name: ActorClassToUse
Variables.Description: The actor class to attach new instance static mesh components to

Variables.Name: InstanceReplacementThreshold
Variables.Description: The number of static mesh instances needed before a mesh is replaced with an instanced version

Variables.Name: MeshReplacementMethod
Variables.Description: How to replace the original actors when instancing

Variables.Name: bSkipMeshesWithVertexColors
Variables.Description:
Whether to skip the conversion to an instanced static mesh for meshes with vertex colors.
	  Instanced static meshes do not support vertex colors per-instance, so conversion will lose
	  this data.

Variables.Name: bUseHLODVolumes
Variables.Description: Whether split up instanced static mesh components based on their intersection with HLOD volumes
